description: AI analytics system with OpenRouter chat + report modes, SQL/tRPC tools, Daytona Python sandbox, and PDF report generation

userStories.title: Audit Existing Utilities for AI Analytics
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit existing code before implementing AI analytics so that we reuse utilities and avoid duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Search src/lib/ for existing AI-related utilities, formatting helpers, analytics calculations
Search src/server/api/routers/analytics.ts for all available endpoints and their input/output shapes
Search src/server/api/routers/trades.ts for query patterns and user-scoping logic
Document all 24+ analytics endpoints with descriptions (name, what it returns, input filters) in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Document existing schema context (all tables, columns, types, relationships) in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Comprehensive audit completed. Documented 28 analytics endpoints, 30 trades endpoints, 20 tables, 16 enums, and all existing utilities. No AI-specific code exists yet.

userStories.title: Update AI Schema — Conversations, Messages, Reports
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to update the AI database schema to support chat mode, report mode, and track model/token usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Create new enums: aiConversationStatusEnum (active, generating, complete, failed), aiConversationModeEnum (chat, report), aiReportStatusEnum (queued, generating, complete, failed)

Update aiConversations table: add status (aiConversationStatusEnum, default active), mode (aiConversationModeEnum), initialPrompt (text), dateRangeStart (timestamp), dateRangeEnd (timestamp), model (text)
Update aiMessages table: add model (text, nullable), tokensUsed (integer, nullable), toolCalls (text, nullable — JSON string)

Create aiReports table: id, userId (FK to users), conversationId (FK to aiConversations), title, prompt, model, status (aiReportStatusEnum), pdfUrl (text, nullable), pdfKey (text, nullable), tokensUsed (integer), triggerTaskId (text, nullable), createdAt, completedAt (timestamp, nullable)
Add relations: aiReports → aiConversations, aiReports → users
Export new types: AiReport, NewAiReport
Add id generator for reports in src/lib/shared (ids.aiReport())
Run bun run db:push to apply schema
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added 3 new enums (aiConversationStatus, aiConversationMode, aiReportStatus), updated aiConversations with status/mode/initialPrompt/dateRange/model columns, updated aiMessages with model/tokensUsed/toolCalls columns, created aiReports table with full schema, added relations and type exports, added aiReport ID generator.

userStories.title: AI Constants and Model Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want AI-related constants centralized so that model lists, default settings, and limits are never hardcoded in components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/constants/ai.ts
Export DEFAULT_CHAT_MODEL string (e.g., moonshotai/kimi-k2 or similar cheap model)
Export DEFAULT_REPORT_MODEL string (e.g., anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 for deeper analysis)
Export AI_MODELS array: { id: string, name: string, provider: string, description: string, mode: 'chat' | 'report' | 'both' }
Export AI_MODES constant for chat/report mode options
Export MAX_CHAT_MESSAGES_PER_CONVERSATION (50)
Export MAX_REPORT_TOKENS (100000)
Export SUGGESTED_CHAT_QUERIES array (at least 6 trading-specific queries)
Export SUGGESTED_REPORT_PROMPTS array (at least 4 deep analysis prompts)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/constants/ai.ts with DEFAULT_CHAT_MODEL (moonshotai/kimi-k2), DEFAULT_REPORT_MODEL (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4), AI_MODELS array (6 models), AI_MODES constant, MAX_CHAT_MESSAGES_PER_CONVERSATION (50), MAX_REPORT_TOKENS (100000), SUGGESTED_CHAT_QUERIES (8 queries), SUGGESTED_REPORT_PROMPTS (5 prompts). All exported via constants index.

userStories.title: OpenRouter Client Service
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an OpenRouter API client so that the AI system can call any model via a unified interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/client.ts with OpenRouter client
Uses OPENROUTER_API_KEY env variable (server-side only)
Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to .env.example
Supports streaming responses via async generator or ReadableStream
Supports non-streaming responses for tool calling loops
Supports tool/function calling in OpenAI-compatible format
Model parameter accepts any string (e.g., anthropic/claude-sonnet-4, moonshotai/kimi-k2, openai/gpt-4.1)
Default model pulled from constants in src/lib/constants/ai.ts
Handles rate limiting and retries (exponential backoff, 3 retries)
Returns token usage from response
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/client.ts with chatCompletion (non-streaming) and chatCompletionStream (async generator). OpenAI-compatible tool calling support, exponential backoff retry (3 retries, 429/5xx), token usage via response.usage. OPENROUTER_API_KEY added to src/env.js server schema.

userStories.title: Schema Context Generator
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to auto-generate a schema description from the Drizzle schema so the AI knows all tables, columns, types, and relationships without hallucinating.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/schema-context.ts
Export generateSchemaContext() function that returns a string
Includes all table names, column names, column types, nullable info, and enum values
Includes relationship descriptions (e.g., trades belong to users via userId)
Includes example SQL queries for common patterns (P&L by day, trades with tags, etc.)
Includes list of available tRPC analytics endpoints with descriptions (from US-000 audit)
Context is a static string (generated once, not per-request)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/schema-context.ts with generateSchemaContext() returning a comprehensive static string. Includes all 19 enums, 20 tables with full column details (type, nullable, notes), relationship descriptions, 7 example SQL queries (P&L by day, by symbol, trades with tags, win rate by strategy, equity curve, monthly performance, holding time, R-multiple), and 20 analytics + 2 trades tRPC endpoints with descriptions and filter schema.

userStories.title: AI Context Builder — User-Specific Context
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a context builder that loads a user's strategies, tags, trading sessions, and recent journals to give the AI personalized context.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/context-builder.ts
Export buildUserContext(userId: string, db: DatabaseInstance) async function
Loads user's strategies (names, descriptions, entry/exit criteria, risk parameters)
Loads user's tags (names, colors)
Loads user's trading sessions (custom session definitions from settings)
Loads user's account list (names, types, instruments)
Loads user's recent journal entries (last 7 days, content summaries)
Loads user's breakeven threshold from settings
Returns formatted string suitable for system prompt injection
Handles missing data gracefully (new users with no strategies, etc.)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/context-builder.ts with buildUserContext(userId, db) async function. Loads strategies (with rules), tags, accounts, user settings (timezone, breakeven threshold, trading sessions), and recent journal entries (last 7 days). All data loaded in parallel via Promise.all. Returns formatted markdown string for system prompt injection. Handles missing data gracefully for new users.

userStories.title: AI System Prompt — Trading Analyst Persona
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a well-crafted system prompt that makes the AI behave as an expert trading analyst with access to the user's data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/prompts/trading-analyst.ts
Export buildSystemPrompt(params: { schemaContext: string, userContext: string, mode: chat | report }) function
Persona: Expert trading performance analyst and coach
Instructs AI on available tools (run_query, call_analytics, get_market_data, run_python)
Instructs AI that SQL queries are automatically user-scoped via CTEs
Chat mode instructions: concise, conversational, use tools to answer quickly
Report mode instructions: thorough, use multiple tools, generate charts, deep analysis
Includes schema context and user context as reference sections
Reminds AI about decimal handling (P&L stored as strings, parse with parseFloat)
Reminds AI about timestamp handling (all timestamps with timezone)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/prompts/trading-analyst.ts with buildSystemPrompt({schemaContext, userContext, mode}) function. Persona: expert trading analyst and coach. Includes tool instructions for run_query (SQL auto-scoped via CTEs), call_analytics (tRPC endpoints), get_market_data (OHLC candles), run_python (sandbox execution). Chat mode: concise, conversational, prefer call_analytics over SQL. Report mode: thorough, multi-tool, charts, structured sections. Data handling notes: decimal string P&L, UTC timestamps, soft deletes, breakeven threshold.

userStories.title: AI Tool — run_query (Read-Only SQL Execution)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tool that lets the AI execute read-only SQL queries scoped to the current user so it can answer custom questions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/run-query.ts
Export tool definition in OpenAI function-calling format (name, description, parameters JSON schema)
Export executeRunQuery(userId: string, query: string) async function
Validates query is SELECT-only (reject INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, TRUNCATE, CREATE)
Wraps query in user-scoped CTEs: WITH user_trades AS (SELECT * FROM trade WHERE user_id = $1), user_accounts AS (...) for all user-owned tables
Returns results as JSON array of objects
Limits result rows to 500
Handles SQL errors gracefully (returns error message, not stack trace)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/tools/run-query.ts with runQueryToolDefinition (OpenAI function-calling format) and executeRunQuery(userId, query, db). SELECT-only validation using pattern matching (blocks INSERT INTO, DELETE FROM, UPDATE SET, DROP, ALTER, etc.) with string literal stripping to avoid false positives on 'deleted_at'. User-scoped CTEs for 15 tables (user_trades, user_accounts, user_tags, user_strategies, etc.). Results wrapped in subquery with LIMIT 500. Graceful SQL error handling.

userStories.title: AI Tool — call_analytics (Existing tRPC Endpoints)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tool that lets the AI invoke existing analytics tRPC endpoints as a convenience shortcut.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/call-analytics.ts
Export tool definition in OpenAI function-calling format
Export executeCallAnalytics(userId: string, endpoint: string, input: Record<string, unknown>) async function

Supports analytics router: getOverview, getPerformanceByDayOfWeek, getPerformanceByHour, getPerformanceBySession, getPerformanceByMonth, getRiskMetrics, getEquityCurve, getDrawdownHistory, getRMultipleDistribution, getRiskRewardAnalysis, getPositionSizeAnalysis, getPerformanceBySymbol, getStreakAnalysis, getRevengeTrading, getOvertradingAnalysis, getHoldingTimeAnalysis, getBehavioralPatterns, getMonteCarloSimulation
Also supports trades router: getStats, getAll (with filters)
Creates server-side caller using createCallerFactory with user context
Validates endpoint name is in allowlist
Returns JSON results
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/tools/call-analytics.ts with callAnalyticsToolDefinition (OpenAI function-calling format) and executeCallAnalytics(userId, router, endpoint, input). Allowlists 22 analytics endpoints (getOverview, getCalendarData, performance by day/hour/session/month, risk metrics, equity curve, drawdowns, R-multiple, position size, symbols, streaks, revenge trading, overtrading, holding time, behavioral patterns, Monte Carlo, trade count, export) and 2 trades endpoints (getStats, getAll). Creates server-side tRPC caller via createTRPCContext + createCaller with userId override. Validates router and endpoint against allowlists. Returns standardized { success, data, error } result.

userStories.title: AI Tool — get_market_data (Candle Data for Price Analysis)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tool that lets the AI fetch OHLC market data for specific symbols and time ranges so it can analyze price action.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/get-market-data.ts
Export tool definition in OpenAI function-calling format
Export executeGetMarketData(symbol: string, interval: string, startDate: string, endDate: string) async function
Uses existing market data service (src/lib/market-data/service.ts) and candle cache
Returns array of { timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume } objects
Limits response to max 1000 bars
Handles missing data gracefully
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/ai/tools/get-market-data.ts with getMarketDataToolDefinition (OpenAI function-calling format) and executeGetMarketData(symbol, interval, startDate, endDate). Uses existing getOHLCForTimeRange from market data service (Databento for futures, Twelve Data for forex). Validates interval (1min/5min/15min/30min/1h/4h), parses ISO 8601 dates, limits results to 1000 bars. Returns bars with ISO timestamp strings, OHLCV values, bar count, and data quality indicator.

userStories.title: AI Tool — run_python (Daytona Sandbox Execution)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tool that lets the AI execute Python code in a Daytona sandbox for statistical analysis and chart generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/run-python.ts
Export tool definition in OpenAI function-calling format
Export executeRunPython(code: string, dataContext?: string) async function
Integrates with Daytona SDK to create/reuse sandboxes
Add DAYTONA_API_KEY to .env.example
Pre-installed packages: pandas, numpy, scipy, matplotlib, plotly, seaborn, statsmodels
Captures stdout/stderr output
Captures generated image files (matplotlib savefig, plotly write_image)
Uploads generated images to S3 (Cloudflare R2) and returns URLs
Execution timeout: 60 seconds
Returns { stdout: string, stderr: string, images: string[], artifacts: string[] }
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: AI Tool Registry and Executor
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a unified tool registry that collects all AI tool definitions and handles execution dispatching.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/tools/index.ts
Export AI_TOOLS array with all tool definitions (run_query, call_analytics, get_market_data, run_python)
Export executeTool(toolName: string, args: Record<string, unknown>, context: { userId: string }) async function
Dispatches to correct tool executor based on tool name
Returns standardized result: { success: boolean, data?: unknown, error?: string }
Handles unknown tool names gracefully (returns error, does not throw)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: AI tRPC Router — Chat Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints for AI chat so the frontend can create conversations, send messages, and receive responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/server/api/routers/ai.ts
Register ai router in src/server/api/root.ts
createConversation mutation: creates conversation with mode (chat/report), returns conversation ID
sendMessage mutation: accepts conversationId + content, saves user message, calls OpenRouter with tool loop, saves assistant response, returns assistant message
getConversation query: returns conversation with all messages ordered by createdAt
listConversations query: returns paginated list of user conversations (most recent first)
deleteConversation mutation: deletes conversation and all messages
All procedures use protectedProcedure
User ownership validated (can only access own conversations)
sendMessage implements full tool-calling loop: call model → execute tool_calls → feed results back → repeat until text response
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: AI tRPC Router — Report Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints for AI report generation so users can request, track, and download reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Add to src/server/api/routers/ai.ts:
startReport mutation: creates report record + conversation in report mode, triggers Trigger.dev task, returns report ID
getReport query: returns report by ID with status and PDF URL
listReports query: returns paginated list of user reports (most recent first)
getReportStatus query: returns just the status of a report (for polling)
All procedures use protectedProcedure
User ownership validated for all report queries
startReport saves initial prompt as first aiMessage in the conversation
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for AI Router
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the AI tRPC router so that we can verify correct behavior and prevent regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created: tests/integration/ai.test.ts
Tests use setupTrader() fixture
Test: createConversation creates a conversation in chat mode
Test: createConversation creates a conversation in report mode
Test: sendMessage saves user message and returns assistant message (mock OpenRouter response)
Test: getConversation returns conversation with messages
Test: listConversations returns only the current user's conversations
Test: deleteConversation removes conversation and messages
Test: user cannot access another user's conversations
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)

userStories.title: Trigger.dev Report Generation Task
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Trigger.dev long-running task that orchestrates deep AI report generation with multi-step tool calling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/trigger/generate-ai-report.ts
Task accepts: reportId, userId, prompt, model, dateRange (optional start/end)
Loads user context via buildUserContext and schema context via generateSchemaContext
Runs multi-turn tool-calling loop with AI model (up to 20 tool rounds)
Each tool call result is fed back to the model
Saves all messages to the conversation's aiMessages table
Tracks total tokens used across all rounds
Updates report status: queued → generating → complete / failed
On failure: updates report status to failed
Uses metadata.reportId for idempotency
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: Report PDF Generation and Upload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reports compiled into PDF format and uploaded to S3 for download.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/ai/report-pdf.ts
Export generateReportPdf(params: { title, content, charts: string[], codeArtifacts: string[] }) async function
Uses Puppeteer or @react-pdf/renderer to compile HTML → PDF
PDF styled with Terminal design theme (dark bg #050505, chartreuse #d4ff00, monospace fonts)
Includes: title, date range, analysis sections, embedded chart images, code appendix
Uploads PDF to S3 (Cloudflare R2) using existing storage patterns from storage router
Returns { pdfUrl: string, pdfKey: string }
Updates aiReports record with pdfUrl and pdfKey
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.title: Report Email Delivery via Resend
userStories.description: As a developer, I want completed reports emailed to the user so they can access them without logging in.

Uses Resend SDK for email delivery
Add RESEND_API_KEY to .env.example
Email template: Terminal-styled HTML with report title, timestamp, download button
Presigned download URL expires in 7 days
Called from Trigger.dev task after PDF upload completes
